# LobangKing.sg

> Every Deal in Singapore — verified daily.

Static, automated, AI-assisted deals website. Full machine-readable architecture blueprint for rebuilding or understanding this system is in MOTHERLODE.yaml (structured) and MOTHERLODE.md (English).

## Key docs
- [Blueprint (structured)](MOTHERLODE.yaml): every component, script, security control, data model, roadmap.
- [Blueprint (English)](MOTHERLODE.md): the same, as a rebuild playbook.
- [README](README.md): deploy + operations.
- [Security](SECURITY.md): threat model + hardening.

## Site
- [All deals](deals.html) · [About](about.html) · [Submit a deal](submit.html)
- Deals data: [deals.json](data/deals.json) · Feed: [feed.xml](feed.xml)
